login_new_device.title: New device login
login_new_device.body: A login was made from device: {{device_name}} — If this wasn't you, please revoke the session immediately.

session_revoked.title: Your session was revoked
session_revoked.body: Your session has been revoked by an administrator. Please log in again.

trial_ending.title: Trial ending soon
trial_ending.body: Your trial ends in {{days_remaining}} days. Please upgrade your subscription to continue.

subscription_expired.title: Subscription expired
subscription_expired.body: Your subscription has expired. Please renew it to regain access.

payment_failed.title: Payment failed
payment_failed.body: A payment of {{amount}} {{currency}} failed. Please review your payment method.

payment_success.title: Payment successful
payment_success.body: A payment of {{amount}} {{currency}} was completed successfully.

expense_requested.title: New expense request
expense_requested.body: {{cashier_name}} requested an expense of {{amount}} SAR — awaiting your approval.

expense_approved.title: Expense request approved
expense_approved.body: Your expense request of {{amount}} SAR has been approved.

expense_rejected.title: Expense request rejected
expense_rejected.body: Your expense request was rejected. Reason: {{reason}}.

shift_opened.title: Shift opened
shift_opened.body: A new shift was opened by {{cashier_name}} at branch {{branch_name}}.

shift_closed.title: Shift closed
shift_closed.body: The shift was closed by {{cashier_name}}. Total: {{amount}} SAR.

inventory_stock_deduction_failed.title: Warning: Stock not deducted
inventory_stock_deduction_failed.body: The sale completed successfully but automatic stock deduction failed. Please review inventory manually.
